title: Seeded Recursive Backtracking Generation · Runtime Lens: Unvisited Neighbors
summary: Generation chooses visited neighbors, recursive depth overflows silently, random state is global, and completion is confused with connectivity. Predict the model, event, graph, solver, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the unvisited neighbors increment in seeded iterative and recursive backtracker. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Enumerate in-bounds unvisited neighbors before randomized selection and retain deterministic ordering before shuffling.
Maintain a current cell, visited set, frontier stack or call path, reciprocal passages, and a progress invariant.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-maze-solver-python cumulative accessible desktop maze portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python grid, graph, search, state, and scheduler models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts,
focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, display scaling,
packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazePolicy:
    rows: int = 12
    columns: int = 16
    seed: int = 314159
    maximum_cells: int = 16_384
    reduced_motion: bool = False


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazeEvidence:
    revision: str
    topology_digest: str
    action_trace_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str
    artifact_digest: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python maze solver portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: maze-worked-maze-generation-backtracker-2
# Competency: maze-worked-maze-generation-backtracker-2.
# Case 7417: a keyboard-only puzzle tournament.
# Operating constraint: the prior good state must survive failure.
# Changed case: change the grid dimensions and preserve every invariant.
def worked_maze_generation_backtracker_2(cells: int = 48, visited: int = 48, carved_edges: int = 47, stack_peak: int = 21, replay_match: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "gridworked2",
        "topology7417",
        "search2dekrow",
        "eventworked27417",
        "access7417worked2",
        "recovery2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if cells < 1 or visited < 0 or carved_edges < 0:
        return False, visited, "generation-count"
    if visited != cells:
        return False, visited, "unvisited-cell"
    if carved_edges != cells - 1:
        return False, carved_edges, "tree-shape"
    if stack_peak < 1 or not replay_match:
        return False, stack_peak, "replay-invariant"
    assert visited == cells and carved_edges == cells - 1
    return True, visited, "seeded-backtracker"

steps.title: Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Defend the Unvisited Neighbors model · Theory Unvisited Neighbors
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Unvisited Neighbors: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory puzzle team handles case 5627 during a classroom algorithm comparison. Build deterministic Python evidence to validate seeded backtracking progress, completion, topology, depth, and replay; resource use must remain below an explicit budget; then change the seed and retain replay identity. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. Competency probe: Enumerate in-bounds unvisited neighbors before randomized selection and retain deterministic ordering before shuffling.

Evidence target: Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Defend the Unvisited Neighbors model · Theory Unvisited Neighbors.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Defend the Unvisited Neighbors model · Theory Unvisited Neighbors, keep Unvisited Neighbors connected to executable Python grid, topology, search, event, state, accessibility, package, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Enumerate in-bounds unvisited neighbors before randomized selection and retain deterministic ordering before shuffling.

hints: For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Defend the Unvisited Neighbors model · Theory Unvisited Neighbors, name the player, revision, Python, Tcl and Tk versions, grid, coordinate, seed, topology, frontier, path, event, state, render, accessibility, package, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Unvisited Neighbors precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Defend the Unvisited Neighbors model · Theory Unvisited Neighbors, trace this concrete input and predict coordinate, wall, topology, frontier, route, callback, transition, render, accessibility, failure, rollback, recovery, and native evidence before reviewing it: A theory puzzle team handles case 5627 during a classroom algorithm comparison. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. Competency probe: Enumerate in-bounds unvisited neighbors before randomized selection and retain deterministic ordering before shuffling.

For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Defend the Unvisited Neighbors model · Theory Unvisited Neighbors, challenge the documented misconception with changed-grid, seed, wall, generator, solver, weight, heuristic, callback, state, focus, scale, save, package, recovery, and controlled native-transfer evidence: A set iteration order plus a seed is reproducible.

checks.description: The cumulative python portfolio contains this competency’s named evidence increment.
checks.failureMessage: Add the exact evidence marker # Evidence: maze-unvisited-neighbors-34i5ur.

checks.pattern: # Evidence: maze-unvisited-neighbors-34i5ur(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?def\s+evidence_maze_unvisited_neighbors_34i5ur\s*\((?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?\)\s*(?:->[^:]+)?\s*:(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?cells < 1 or visited < 0 or carved_edges < 0)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?visited != cells)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?carved_edges != cells - 1)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?stack_peak < 1 or not replay_match)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?assert)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
